name: Scan business cards with Gemini AI, log contacts to Google Sheets and Calendar

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "full_name": "Taro Yamada",
  "full_name_reading": "ヤマダ タロウ",
  "company": "Acme Corporation",
  "department": "Marketing Division",
  "job_title": "Senior Manager",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "phone": "03-1234-5678",
  "mobile": "090-1234-5678",
  "fax": "03-1234-5679",
  "postal_code": "150-0001",
  "address": "1-2-3 Shibuya, Shibuya-ku, Tokyo",
  "website": "https://acme.co.jp",
  "notes": "",
  "confidence": "high"
}

parameters.text:
=You are a business card OCR specialist. Analyze the attached business card image and extract all contact information.

Extract the following fields with high accuracy:
- full_name: Full name as printed on the card
- full_name_reading: Reading/pronunciation in katakana (for Japanese names) or leave empty
- company: Company or organization name
- department: Department or division
- job_title: Job title or position
- email: Email address
- phone: Office phone number (keep original format with hyphens)
- mobile: Mobile phone number (keep original format)
- fax: Fax number if present
- postal_code: Postal/ZIP code
- address: Full address
- website: Website URL
- notes: Any other relevant information (e.g. qualifications, social media)
- confidence: "high", "medium", or "low" based on image quality and readability

Rules:
- For Japanese business cards, extract both kanji name and reading if available
- Keep phone numbers in their original format (e.g. 03-1234-5678)
- If a field is not present on the card, use an empty string
- Set confidence to "low" if the image is blurry or partially unreadable

parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $('Extract Contact Info').item.json.output.full_name }},

It was a pleasure meeting you. I would love to stay in touch and explore potential opportunities to collaborate.

Please feel free to reach out anytime.

Best regards

This draft was auto-generated from a scanned business card. Please review and personalize before sending.
parameters.subject: =Nice meeting you - {{ $('Extract Contact Info').item.json.output.full_name }}

parameters.message:
=

Business card scan failed

The following file could not be processed:

File{{ $('New Card in Drive').item.json.name }}
ReasonExtraction returned empty name or low confidence
Time{{ $now.toISO() }}

Please check the image quality and try again.
parameters.subject: =[Card Scan Failed] {{ $('New Card in Drive').item.json.name }}

parameters.content:
### How it works

Drop a business card photo into your Google Drive folder. This workflow picks it up automatically, sends the image to Gemini 2.5 Flash for OCR, and extracts 14 contact fields — name, company, title, email, phone, address, and more.

If the extraction looks good (name found, confidence not low), the contact gets logged to Google Sheets. Then two things happen in parallel: a follow-up event lands on your Google Calendar for one week out, and a draft email shows up in Gmail ready for you to personalize and send.

If the scan fails — blurry photo, unreadable text — you get an error alert email so nothing slips through.

### Setup steps

1. Make a **Business Cards** folder in Google Drive — grab the folder ID from the URL
2. Create a spreadsheet with 15 headers: Full Name, Reading, Company, Department, Job Title, Email, Phone, Mobile, Fax, Postal Code, Address, Website, Notes, Source File, Scanned At
3. Wire up credentials: Google Drive, Sheets, Calendar, Gmail (all OAuth2) + Gemini API key
4. Set your folder ID in **New Card in Drive**, spreadsheet ID in **Save to Contact Sheet**, and notification email in **Send Error Alert**

### Customization

- Change `$now.plus({week: 1})` in **Schedule Follow-up** to adjust timing
- Edit the draft template in **Draft Follow-up Email**
- Add or remove Sheets columns to fit your CRM

## Trigger & download
Watches your Drive folder every minute and grabs new card images automatically.

## AI contact extraction
Gemini 2.5 Flash reads the card image and pulls out 14 structured fields via the output parser.

## Validate & save
Checks extraction quality, then logs the contact to your Sheets tracker with 15 columns.

## Auto follow-up
Calendar event + Gmail draft created in parallel — review the draft before sending.

## Error alert
If the scan fails or confidence is low, you get an email with the filename so you can retake the photo.
